category_sources: source_facts.description says PlantUML draws UML diagrams; official PlantUML docs describe creating diagrams from text descriptions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official website branding use PlantUML.
docs_sources: Official PlantUML documentation includes the Quick Start, guide, and language reference guide on plantuml.com/pdf.plantuml.net.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
